articles.headline: Jordan Ayew: Ghana want to bring pride to Accra flood victims - 'I have friends there'
articles.description: Ghana captain Jordan Ayew said he is determined to bring joy to those affected by flooding in Accra when the Black Stars face Colombia in Friday's World Cup round-of-32 meeting.

articles.headline: Thomas Tuchel: World Cup 'karma' on England's side at Azteca after 'Hand of God'
